# Prosociality

Prosociality includes motivation and behavior oriented toward helping, caring for, or cooperating with others.

## Current focus

- Empathy
- Compassion
- Helping motivation
- Loving-kindness and other contemplative practices
- Book-based and identity-based interventions

## Links to projects

- [Book interventions](../projects/book-interventions.qmd)
- [Methods and measures](../methods-and-measures.qmd)
